name: Konoa Dashboard
description: Professional financial trading dashboard with live market analysis, technical indicators, real-time charts, news feeds, and customizable watchlists.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; frame-src 'self' https://www.tradingview.com https://s3.tradingview.com; connect-src 'self' https://example.com https://api.rss2json.com https://feeds.bloomberg.com https://www.theguardian.com https://rss.nytimes.com https://www.aljazeera.com https://www.cnbc.com http://feeds.reuters.com https://www.nasdaqtrader.com;
